summary: End-to-end testing of SEO Drafts Review Queue. Wrote 15 new API integration tests (all pass) covering admin gating on all 5 endpoints, list envelope, skip/approve/regenerate flows with real MongoDB writes + 1 live LLM smoke call. Frontend smoke-tested as admin: /admin/marketing?tab=seo-drafts renders panel with 310 pending drafts, filter pills re-fetch correctly with status query param, Custom tweak toggle reveals textarea, Regenerate/Skip/Save controls present per card. No functional bugs found.
action_items: Minor testid naming inconsistency vs review_request spec: actual testid is 'seo-drafts-scan-now-btn' but the review_request referenced 'seo-drafts-scan-now'. Functionally present and visible; consider aligning naming in docs/spec.
Pre-existing React warning in AdminDashboard: 'Encountered two children with the same key, 2026-3'. Not related to SEO Drafts feature but worth investigating separately.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/seo_drafts.py imports private symbol `_SYSTEM_MESSAGE` from services.ai_descriptions — consider promoting to a public constant or re-exporting to avoid the single-underscore import smell.

approve_draft endpoint writes to products collection before flipping draft status. If the Mongo update_one on the draft fails after save_generated_description succeeds, the product would be updated but the draft remains pending — ordering is fine in practice but consider wrapping in a transaction or at least logging partial-failure state for traceability.

scan_for_missing_descriptions uses Semaphore(4) for parallel LLM calls — this is reasonable, but there is no per-call timeout passed to LlmChat.send_message which could cause the scan to hang on a slow backend.

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 API tests passing; plus 8/8 pre-existing unit tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required UI elements present, filter re-fetch + custom tweak toggle verified)

seed_data_creation: Each mutation test seeds its own throwaway product (id prefix 'test-sd-api-<uuid>') + draft directly via Mongo and cleans up in finally block. Zero impact on the existing 310 pending drafts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO Drafts feature is fully wired and verified. 310 pre-existing pending drafts from an earlier scan run remain in seo_description_drafts collection — do NOT wipe. When adding more tests, use id prefix 'test-sd-api-' for seeded data to stay consistent with the cleanup pattern. One live LLM regenerate call was made for the smoke test; cost minimal. Filter pills use data-testid 'seo-drafts-filter-{pending|approved|skipped}' and cards expose 'seo-draft-{textarea|variant|toggle-custom|regenerate|approve|skip}-<draft_id>'. Scan button testid is 'seo-drafts-scan-now-btn'.
